creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: meta
Date: Wed Feb 27 01:35:33 UTC 2019
New revision: 494004
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/494004

Log:
  New port: x11-themes/papirus-icon-theme

  Papirus is a free and open source SVG icon theme, based on Paper Icon
  Set with a lot of new icons and a few extras, like Hardcode-Tray
  support, KDE colorscheme support, Folder Color support, and others.

  WWW: https://git.io/papirus-icon-theme

  PR:		236046
  Submitted by:	Hiroki Tagato <tagattie@yandex.com>

Changes:
  head/x11-themes/Makefile
  head/x11-themes/papirus-icon-theme/
  head/x11-themes/papirus-icon-theme/Makefile
  head/x11-themes/papirus-icon-theme/distinfo
  head/x11-themes/papirus-icon-theme/pkg-descr
  head/x11-themes/papirus-icon-theme/pkg-plist
